import io
import string
import list

fn remove_at(_ xs: List<Int>, _ idx: Int) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  while i < xs.len()
    if i != idx
      match xs.get(i)
      when Some(v)
        result = list.push(result, v)
      when None
        ()
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

fn find_min_idx(_ xs: List<Int>) -> Int
  mut min_idx = 0
  mut min_val = 0
  match xs.get(0)
  when Some(v)
    min_val = v
  when None
    ()
  end
  mut i = 1
  while i < xs.len()
    match xs.get(i)
    when Some(v)
      if v < min_val
        min_val = v
        min_idx = i
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  min_idx
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let text = io.read_to_end()
  let tokens = string.split_whitespace(text)
  mut nums: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  while i < tokens.len()
    match tokens.get(i)
    when Some(tok)
      match string.parse_int(tok)
      when Some(n)
        if not list.contains(nums, n)
          nums = list.push(nums, n)
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end

  mut sorted: List<Int> = []
  while nums.len() > 0
    let idx = find_min_idx(nums)
    match nums.get(idx)
    when Some(v)
      sorted = list.push(sorted, v)
    when None
      ()
    end
    nums = remove_at(nums, idx)
  end

  mut out = ""
  mut j = 0
  while j < sorted.len()
    match sorted.get(j)
    when Some(v)
      if j == 0
        out = "#{v}"
      else
        out = "#{out} #{v}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    j = j + 1
  end
  println(out)
end
